item: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

flip_turn.quote: Sistem hukum kita memang mengedepankan kesejahteraan umum, tetapi itu tidak berarti hak individu benar-benar diabaikan.

notes: Agent A begins with clear support for social priority, then softens into a balance/coexistence frame while still keeping Indonesian collective welfare as important. Agent B remains rights-first throughout, with only bounded acknowledgement of communal well-being. Agent B turn 6 contains a mixed-script artifact: "集体利益和".
